description: Prompt subtly references tools that don't exist in enso. Tests whether the model reaches for the prompt-suggested name (str_replace, apply_patch — common in other harnesses) or uses enso's actual edit tool. The check verifies the rename happened either way; the metric to watch is hallucinated_tools.
prompt: Use str_replace to change OldName to NewName in foo.go. If str_replace isn't available, fall back to whatever edit tool you have.
